'''âp-l-f-k''' ('''kapalfekoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:telemarket|telemarket]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-l-f-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:telemarket|telemarket]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âp-l-f-k
|-
! Lemma
| kapalfekoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipalfekoko|thipalfekoko]] || [[word:jipalfekoko|jipalfekoko]] || [[word:shipalfekoko|shipalfekoko]] || [[word:kipalfekoko|kipalfekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupalfekoko|thuthupalfekoko]] || [[word:jujupalfekoko|jujupalfekoko]] || [[word:shushupalfekoko|shushupalfekoko]] || [[word:kukupalfekoko|kukupalfekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thupalfekoko|thupalfekoko]] || [[word:jupalfekoko|jupalfekoko]] || [[word:shupalfekoko|shupalfekoko]] || [[word:kupalfekoko|kupalfekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thupalfekoko|thupalfekoko]] || [[word:jupalfekoko|jupalfekoko]] || [[word:shupalfekoko|shupalfekoko]] || [[word:kupalfekoko|kupalfekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thepalfekoko|thepalfekoko]] || [[word:jepalfekoko|jepalfekoko]] || [[word:shepalfekoko|shepalfekoko]] || [[word:kepalfekoko|kepalfekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothopalfekoko|thothopalfekoko]] || [[word:jojopalfekoko|jojopalfekoko]] || [[word:shoshopalfekoko|shoshopalfekoko]] || [[word:kokopalfekoko|kokopalfekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopalfekoko|thopalfekoko]] || [[word:jopalfekoko|jopalfekoko]] || [[word:shopalfekoko|shopalfekoko]] || [[word:kopalfekoko|kopalfekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopalfekoko|thopalfekoko]] || [[word:jopalfekoko|jopalfekoko]] || [[word:shopalfekoko|shopalfekoko]] || [[word:kopalfekoko|kopalfekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠpalfekoko|thĂŠpalfekoko]] || [[word:jĂŠpalfekoko|jĂŠpalfekoko]] || [[word:shĂŠpalfekoko|shĂŠpalfekoko]] || [[word:kĂŠpalfekoko|kĂŠpalfekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathapalfekoko|thathapalfekoko]] || [[word:jajapalfekoko|jajapalfekoko]] || [[word:shashapalfekoko|shashapalfekoko]] || [[word:kakapalfekoko|kakapalfekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapalfekoko|thapalfekoko]] || [[word:japalfekoko|japalfekoko]] || [[word:shapalfekoko|shapalfekoko]] || [[word:kapalfekoko|kapalfekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapalfekoko|thapalfekoko]] || [[word:japalfekoko|japalfekoko]] || [[word:shapalfekoko|shapalfekoko]] || [[word:kapalfekoko|kapalfekoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
